scope: Prepare targeted SQL patch for RLS recursion only. No production changes, no SQL execution.

summary.rootCause: current_app_role() and current_profile_id() read public.profiles while policies can invoke those helpers again, causing RLS recursion.

expectedImpact: Profile and role lookup avoids recursive profile RLS evaluation.
Customer ownership policies remain in place.
Customer A/B isolation must still be proven by rerun.
nextActions: Execute the patch only on the Supabase test project after approval.
Keep release NO-GO until Customer A/B isolation passes and blockers are manually reviewed.
